models.name: qwen_2_5_14b
models._comment: DELIBERATELY-WRONG seed for the benchmarking-on-the-fly calibration test. The model-data.json seed for this entry (alpha=10.645, beta=0.04176, gamma=5.77e-5) is the run16 real-vLLM fit; calibration against the blis backend actually recovers alpha~12, beta~0.011, gamma~1.5e-4 (see experiments/calibration-blis/report-2026-06-30-calibration.md). This seed is inflated alpha + ~5x-high gamma: positive/feasible (optimizer won't 404) but it over-scales, so the cycle log shows the allocation correct itself when calibration lands and replaces it.
